description: POLL @ 2026-04-29T23:10Z (~12.07h after prior 11:06Z poll — at-cadence). MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT now 12.46d / 299.12h (was 11.96d / 287.06h at prior poll); 22 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 21); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. STEP 10b IMMINENT WINDOW WATCH (≤7d): 7 April-2026 EOM closures (PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -111) close ~13h from this poll at EOM 2026-04-30 — first post-closure poll likely morning 2026-04-30 (07:35Z daily-review regen) or evening 2026-04-30; PRED-106 also closes 2026-04-30 EOM (newly-ingested, our_verdict=pending); plus PRED-105 false-positive continues per imprecise 'April 2026 (14-day window)' string. Classification rationale: at the per-poll level this is QUIET (zero hash drift on covered surfaces); at the cadence-rollup level the 22-poll auto-only streak + manual-commit drought >12d + 0-regen window represents continued behavioral status quo worth a substantive/MEDIUM tag — escalates to strategic on first dome-side response to imminent closures or canary fix.
